title: Here are the 20 worst-performing stocks among the S&P 500 in 2023
text: The U.S. stock market staged a remarkable rally in 2023, but 173 stocks in the S&P 500 were still down for the year.

title: AES Announces Closing of Previously Announced and New Minority Sell-Downs of LNG Businesses in the Dominican Republic and Panama
text: Raising $338 Million of Asset Sale Proceeds ARLINGTON, Va. , Dec. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) announced today that it has closed minority sell-downs of its businesses in the Dominican Republic and its AES Colón business in Panama for proceeds of $338 million.

title: AES' Board Rewards Shareholders With 4% Dividend Hike
text: AES continues to reward shareholders through dividend hikes. It has been paying dividends for 11 consecutive years.

title: AES Announces 4% Increase in Quarterly Dividend
text: ARLINGTON, Va. , Dec. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) approved an increase of 4% in the Company's quarterly common stock dividend, from $0.1659 per share to $0.1725 per share, beginning in the first quarter of 2024.

title: AES to Divest Majority Interest in Vietnam Coal Plant
text: AES' (AES) sale of coal-fired plant in Vietnam will enable it to expand its footprint in the renewables market, while meeting the growing electricity demand.

title: AES Sees Years of Growth Ahead as It Invests More in Clean Energy
text: AES is a globally diversified utility company. Like others in the industry, AES is increasingly focused on clean energy investments.

title: 5 Relatively Secure And Cheap Dividend Stocks To Invest In - December 2023
text: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight five large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying companies offering large discounts to their historical norms. We go over our filtering process to select just five conservative DGI stocks from more than 7,500 companies that are traded on U.S. exchanges, including OTC networks. In addition to the primary list that yields just over 3%, we present two other groups of five DGI stocks each, with the goal of moderate to high yields.

title: December Looks Great For Investors Who Own 9 Stocks
text: Investors can only hope stocks do as well in December as they did in November. There are definitely some S&P 500 stocks that glisten.
